creator: rom@msfree.com
text:
lynx-ssl-2.8.6_4,1 overwrites the existing configuration files in /usr/local/etc:
Lynx.xfg and lynx.lss.  Should check whether $files are identical with $files.default and, if there are differences, only overwrite .default.

How-To-Repeat: (portpupgrade,make) ls /usr/local/etc/lynx*
